Weather.description: Current conditions, multi-day forecasts, sunrise/sunset, golden hour, moon phases, and air quality for any city worldwide.

Time.description: Current time in any city or timezone, and countdown timers with optional labels. Shows UTC offset and time difference for remote locations. Notifies you when timers complete.
examples: what time is it in Tokyo

Maps.description: Directions, ETA, and distance between locations. Opens step-by-step navigation in Apple Maps.
examples: how far is NYC from Boston

News.description: Latest headlines from 17 RSS sources including BBC, Reuters, Ars Technica, and The Verge. Filter by topic.

Stocks.description: Real-time stock quotes, daily change, and key metrics. Use $TICKER notation or company names.

ReadEmail.description: Read and search your Mail.app inbox. Filter by sender, subject, or keyword.

Email.description: Compose and send emails via Mail.app. Specify recipient, subject, and body.
examples: send email to team about deadline

Translate.description: Translate text between languages using Apple's on-device translation. Supports major world languages.
examples: how do you say goodbye in French

Dictionary.description: Look up word definitions, usage, and etymology using the built-in macOS dictionary.

Convert.description: Convert between units (length, weight, temperature, currency) and encode/decode formats (base64, hex, URL).

Calculator.description: Evaluate math expressions including arithmetic, percentages, trigonometry, and exponents. Shows LaTeX-rendered steps.

Research.description: Multi-turn deep research mode. Searches the web, fetches pages, and synthesizes findings across turns. Type #research to enter.

web_search.description: Search the web via DuckDuckGo, Brave, and Google (fallback chain). Returns top results with snippets.

WikipediaSearch.description: Direct Wikipedia article lookup. Returns article summary and key sections.
examples: tell me about the Roman Empire

Podcast.description: Search Apple Podcasts for shows and episodes. Open results directly in Podcasts.app.

Random.description: Generate random numbers, roll dice, flip coins, draw cards, or pick from a list.

Transcribe.description: Transcribe audio files or voice recordings using on-device speech recognition.

SystemInfo.description: Mac system diagnostics: battery, storage, RAM, CPU, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, uptime, and macOS version.
examples: how much storage do I have

Screenshot.description: Analyze the current screen content. Captures and reads what's visible on your display.

Today.description: Daily briefing: weather, calendar events, reminders, and trending headlines in a single glance.

Calendar.description: View, search, and create calendar events. Shows upcoming schedule and event details.

Contacts.description: Look up contacts by name. Shows phone numbers, email addresses, and other details.

Messages.description: Send iMessages and SMS via Messages.app. Specify the recipient and message body.

Reminders.description: Create, view, and manage reminders in the Reminders app. Supports due dates and times.

Automate.description: Generate and run AppleScript automations. Describe what you want to automate in plain English. Type #automate to enter mode.
examples: #automate resize all images in a folder

TechSupport.description: Interactive Mac diagnostics. Checks Wi-Fi, battery, storage, RAM, Bluetooth, login items, and can force-quit apps. Type #techsupport to enter mode.

Compute.description: Advanced computation: statistics, matrix operations, combinatorics, hashing, base64/hex encoding, and regex testing.

Automation.description: Schedule recurring queries that run automatically at set intervals. Monitor stocks, weather, or any repeating check.

Help.description: Browse tools, take a guided tour, or learn about capabilities and limitations.
